title: list_plugin_skills output
description: Output schema for the list_plugin_skills method — plugin skill roots to index plus config-file paths to watch for plugin install/remove/enable/disable.

dir.description: Absolute path to a directory that may contain SKILL.md bundles. Need not exist — atrium skips missing scopes.

namespace.description: Prefix applied to each discovered skill name (<namespace>:<skill>); typically the plugin id.

scopes.description: Enabled plugins' skill roots, namespaced by plugin id.

watch.description: Absolute config-file paths whose mutation should trigger a re-scan (e.g. the installed-plugins registry and the enable/disable settings file).
